title: Parse RATE_LIMIT_MSG_PER_MIN env var in relay/src/main.rs
description: Why: operator must be able to tune the limit. What: in relay/src/main.rs, parse env var RATE_LIMIT_MSG_PER_MIN: u32 with default 120. Pattern: parse same as KEEPALIVE_SECS (warn on invalid, use default). Pass parsed value to AppState::new.
acceptance_criteria: relay starts and logs the configured limit; default of 120 used when env var absent
close_reason: RATE_LIMIT_MSG_PER_MIN env var parsed in main.rs; default 120
